title: boscia urens
intro: Boscia urens, also known as the dwarf calabash or elephant's head, is a shrub-like plant native to Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its root, which contains alkaloids and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Boscia urens include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Boscia urens is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
